Interface IRasterTypeDataSourceHandler3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control the raster type data source handler.

[Guid("A62CE1BA-E195-4397-9658-A73F2B761DBC")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterTypeDataSourceHandler3 : IRasterTypeDataSourceHandler2, IRasterTypeDataSourceHandler

Properties

DataSourceMemoizer

The object memoizer associated with the data source handler that's capable of caching datasets and workspaces.

IObjectMemoizer DataSourceMemoizer { get; set; }

Property Value

IObjectMemoizer
